title: Illinois Disability Claims Adjudicator Rates (RC-062, CMS rates eff 2025-07-01)
description: Illinois DDS Disability Claims Adjudicator series with verified RC-062 pay-grade assignments and monthly/annual figures: Disability Claims Adjudicator Trainee (12539, grade 13, $57,072-$78,396/yr), Adjudicator I (12537, grade 16, $64,608-$91,572), Adjudicator II (12538, grade 18, $71,136-$101,916), and the senior/lead Disability Claims Specialist (12558, grade 19, $74,904-$108,252). Class->grade from the official Illinois Administrative Code Table W (RC-062); monthly rates from the official IL CMS AFSCME RC-062 Rates of Pay, Regular Formula Rate, effective July 1, 2025. AFSCME Council 31, RC-062 (Technical), Master Contract 2023-2027.

columns.name: classes.<class>.pay_grade
columns.description: RC-062 pay grade, verified from IL Admin Code Table W.

columns.name: classes.<class>.monthly_min
columns.description: Monthly minimum (lowest step) for the RC-062 grade.

columns.name: classes.<class>.monthly_max
columns.description: Monthly maximum (step 8) for the RC-062 grade.

source.publisher: Illinois Department of Central Management Services (CMS) / AFSCME Council 31; IL Dept of Human Services (IDHS) Bureau of Disability Determination Services
source.title: IL Admin Code Table W (RC-062) + IL CMS AFSCME RC-062 Rates of Pay, effective 2025-07-01

update_cadence: CBA cycle (2023-2027); IL CMS rates by effective date
notes: Authoritative: class title -> RC-062 pay grade verified from the official Illinois Administrative Code (Title 80, Part 310, App A, Table W); monthly rates from the official IL CMS AFSCME RC-062 'Rates of Pay' PDF (Regular Formula Rate), EFFECTIVE JULY 1, 2025 page (current as of 2026-06-02; the future 7/1/2026 page in the same PDF was NOT used). Figures extracted from the PDF locally with pypdf. annual = monthly * 12. Corrections: class is 'Disability Claims Adjudicator' (Trainee/I/II), the lead is Disability Claims Specialist (grade 19) — true PSA first-line supervision not separately confirmed. AFSCME Council 31, RC-062 (Technical).
